rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) and (b) as it empirically investigates the core mechanism of "alignment" between humans and AI agents, identifying specific dimensions (e.g., autonomy, ethics, knowledge schema) that are directly relevant to the user's focus on an "Alignment Framework for AI Agents." Even though it uses a qualitative methodology and a specific negotiation task rather than the user's specific "AgentDoG" framework, it provides the canonical empirical baseline and conceptual vocab
